Video.summary: A woman sues a former friend after bailing him out of jail.
Video.title: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Image.alt: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Video.summary: Darious claims his cousin barged into his car, got caught speeding, borrowed money to go to clubs, and more.
Video.title: On The Road

Video.summary: Plaintiff, Reprudentia, is suing a fellow Cameroonian countryman for the $5000 she gave him to buy her a car.
Video.title: Car Troubles

Video.summary: Nancy Moses Hill sues Tracy Jordan for $5,000, claiming Tracy kept too much money from selling her family's antiques. Tracy argues she followed the contract and paid what was due. Nancy insists her elderly mother’s cherished items were undervalued.
Video.title: Antique Ambush

Video.summary: Were they loans? Was she funding her gambling boyfriend in order to rake in the profit?
Video.title: Going for Broke

Video.summary: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but is now asking for it back.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: Anita is ready for marriage, but Roman suspects she has been cheating; a polygraph may push him to propose or dispose.
Video.title: Raggs vs. Walker

Video.summary: A man seeks justice for stolen property and unpaid debt while questioning his future with a distant girlfriend.
Video.title: Whitehurst vs. Briggs

Video.summary: Will is bringing Jazmine to court in a last-ditch effort to save their relationship from the stresses of social media.
Video.title: Bouie vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Yashira seeks to prove that Gregory is the father of her 4-year-old after years of doubt and speculation.
Video.title: Guadalupe vs. Phillips

Video.summary: Tensions run high in the courtroom as Gayla and James decide if they should call off their wedding.
Video.title: Williams vs. Edwards

Video.summary: Former roommates and ex-lovers, Shelby and Natalie, settle a dispute over unpaid rent money.
Video.title: Hannan vs. Davila

Video.summary: Benjamin petitions for a paternity test after his girlfriend, Kenetha, told him during an argument that he is not the father.
Video.title: Brogdon vs. Jenkins

Video.summary: A Miami couple's future is at stake as differing dreams and financial conflicts test their six-year relationship.
Video.title: Benatar vs. Porciello

Video.summary: A scandalous secret and a polygraph test alter the course of Ceia and Luis' relationship.
Video.title: Stewart vs. Abrew

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: As retribution for his serial cheating, Jaylon sues boyfriend Brian for payment from their online video sharing channel profits.
Video.title: Davis vs. Alben

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: Symoan and Hillary seek answers from the Cutlers' compatibility test in an effort to save their 10-year marriage.
Video.title: Willis vs. Greene

Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: Trust issues and tension rise as Danielle confronts Brandon about his ex-wife and lack of motivation.
Video.title: Hatch vs. Banks

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: After her boyfriend, Barry, takes a suspicious "business trip" to Miami, Brooke suspects him of cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Daniels vs. White

Video.summary: After a life-altering amputation, Brooke brings girlfriend Brenna to court to address concerns regarding her caretaking.
Video.title: Fletcher vs. Stewart

Video.summary: Friends-turned-lovers Kemuel and Bridget struggle to take their relationship to the next level due to a lack of trust.
Video.title: Crossty vs. Lovelace

Video.summary: Is this contractor crooked as a bent nail or is this homeowner's behavior in need of renovations?
Video.title: One Door Closes

Video.summary: A woman crashed her sister's car during a snowstorm, and her sister wants payment.
Video.title: Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!

Image.alt: Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!
Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!
Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!

Video.summary: It's music biz mayhem when two men tangle over their boy band. Was it a record label rip off?
Video.title: The Reunion of Swag Kids

Video.summary: Jillian is suing her former landlord for rent, claiming they were perfect tenants. Their landlord, Stephen, claims they partied nonstop and caused damage to the home and surrounding property.
Video.title: Terrible Tenant or Low-Down Landlord?

Video.summary: Nigel says that he got ripped off. Now he wants his money back from producer Daunte.
Video.title: Beating the Bank

Video.summary: Linda says John wrote an IOU for his DUI but he said he was drunk during signing.
Video.title: Too Sauced to Sign

Video.summary: Pablo and Stepanie's relationship was all about the sex. But her change in hormones made him moan.
Video.title: Turning Her Freak Off

Video.summary: Destiny is suing ex-roomate Bisa for unpaid rent. Bisa is counter suing for moving fees and mental anguish.
Video.title: Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: BFFs Earl and Demoun brawl over stolen sushi. But when Demoun put away his fist, he took out his hammer!
Video.title: Fish and Hammer

Video.summary: Monique and Joshua sue landlord Brandi for withholding their $350 deposit, claiming control issues and unfair treatment. Brandi counters, saying Monique’s son broke rules, caused trouble, and left the property damaged.
Video.title: Your House Is Haunted by a Ghost!

Image.alt: Your House Is Haunted by a Ghost!
Your House Is Haunted by a Ghost!
Your House Is Haunted by a Ghost!

Video.summary: Bruce Pouncy claims his landlord, Beatrice Smith, forced him out and kept his $1,200 deposit after he suggested a new roommate. Beatrice says Bruce left the apartment a mess, removed the oven door, and didn’t pay rent.
Video.title: Rental Ruckus

Video.summary: Plaintiff Eva Aleman sues Nicholas Satriano after his pit bull killed her Yorkie, alleging he reneged on promises to cover cremation costs and replace her dog. Nicholas claims her dog was loose and provoked the fight.
Video.title: Your Dog Killed My Dog!

Video.summary: Jennifer Clayton sues Angela Elliott for $4,069.07 after receiving mismarked tiles that didn't match her bathroom. Angela offered free replacements but refused to cover installation costs, arguing Jennifer should’ve noticed the error.
Video.title: You Installed the Wrong Tiles in My Bathroom!

Image.alt: You Installed the Wrong Tiles in My Bathroom!
You Installed the Wrong Tiles in My Bathroom!
You Installed the Wrong Tiles in My Bathroom!

Video.summary: Plaintiff Tien sues landlord Jeffrey for $2,450, claiming he broke his promise to refund her after she backed out of renting his house. Jeffrey insists he doesn’t owe more, saying he already refunded most of the money and was left covering costs.
Video.title: Rental Ruckus

Video.summary: Sherri is suing her ex-husband for her son's unpaid medical bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Teaching a Life Lesson

Video.summary: The plaintiff wants her friend to repay her for a loan; the defendant says she used the money for her daughter's prom, but the plaintiff and her friends broke out into a fight and destroyed the venue, so she has refused to repay her.
Video.title: Prom Night

Video.summary: Emanuel has brought his former friend to court over a collections bill.
Video.title: Gone to Collections

Video.summary: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for a cellphone and cellphone bill and says she caught him cheating; he brings to court threatening text messages she sent to him.
Video.title: Calling Collect

Video.summary: Alisha is being sued by her step father, but says she owes him nothing after he put her in foster care.
Video.title: Coping with Family Chaos

Video.summary: Prestonie sues his mother for assault and hotel bills and claims she admitted to hating him.
Video.title: Mommy Issues

Video.summary: Sarah sues her ex-husband for rent, saying their marriage fell apart due to trust issues and infidelity.
Video.title: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Image.alt: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Video.summary: Olivia is suing her best friend's daughter over a utility bill but Kalia wants nothing to do with her.
Video.title: Someone’s Full of Hot Air

Video.summary: The plaintiff, who took guardianship of the defendant's baby because she was born with meth in her system, sues the birth mother for breach of contract; the defendant counter-sues for unreturned property and says the plaintiff is vindictive.
Video.title: Guardianship Grudges
